queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with individuals lacking a formal checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the risk-mitigating effects of maintaining critical or alternative existing credit accounts on credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of low-to-moderate checking account balances (zero to two hundred DM) to credit default probability.
